text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

commit cd3c02d2e047df7786a3c004fcc275f5aa64b2d9
Author:     Dave Turner <dave@bitboss.ca>
AuthorDate: 2024-06-24 08:31:37 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-06-25 16:14:22 +0000

    devel/gum: Update to 0.14.1

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/charmbracelet/gum/releases/tag/v0.14.1

    What's Changed

     * Show help with Huh?
     * Support using the Home/End keys in pager

    Fixes

     * Handle huh? user aborted error
     * Cursor styling
     * Re-introduce ESC for gum write

    PR:             279573
    Reported by:    dave@bitboss.ca (maintainer)

 devel/gum/distinfo | 10 +++++-----
 2 files changed, 6 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)
